examples: The sheer scale of the investment it took to begin commercial expansion at sea reflects the immensity of the profits that such East-West trade could create.
We were overwhelmed by the sheer immensity of the task.
The immensity of the United States makes air travel common place.
Even so, travelling overland was the most awe-inspiring way to truly understand the immensity of our wonderful planet.
Every big city has a perfect vantage point from which to appreciate its immensity.
